name: Happy path: normal codex turn with both headers emitted
description: opencode runtime calls provider with sessionId only (no threadId). Provider sets threadId := sessionId per DD-1. headers: {session_id, thread_id, x-client-request-id} all carry the same UUID. body.prompt_cache_key carries the same UUID. ws.send resolves via callback under WS_IDLE_TIMEOUT_MS. Backend streams response.* events. wsErrorReason remains null at stream end.
steps: runtime → provider: build request with sessionId='S-uuid'
provider → ws: headers={session_id:S-uuid, thread_id:S-uuid, x-client-request-id:S-uuid, ...}; body.prompt_cache_key=S-uuid
ws → runtime: events forwarded; wsErrorReason=null at stream end

name: Send stall: ws.send callback never fires within WS_IDLE_TIMEOUT_MS (DD-3)
description: Provider issues request. ws.send(...) callback hangs. Send-side idle timer fires. Provider sets wsObs.wsErrorReason='ws_send_timeout', closes the ws, ends stream. Empty-turn classifier reads snapshot; ws_send_timeout maps to category=transient with retry recovery per INV-5. Runtime initiates retry through existing rotation/continuation flow.
steps: ws: ws.send(payload, callback); start race timer (WS_IDLE_TIMEOUT_MS=30s)
timer fires before callback; reject promise with 'ws_send_timeout'
runtime → ws: retry via rotation/continuation flow
